highlights_headline: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1 ships 2 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

bullets.lead: Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

bullets.lead: Move the Blazor workaround into WASM
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

bullets.lead: The Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096)
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried the Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096); Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp; Move the Blazor workaround into WASM.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened this line with internal and infrastructure work only.
